name: Spring Flowers Scatter Accent Rug Pink/White - Threshold™
description:
Bring a touch of floral charm to your home with this Spring Flowers Scatter Accent Rug from Threshold™. Made from 100% polyester material, the rectangular accent rug features a white floral print on a pink backdrop with side tassels for a cute look, and the latex backing helps keep it in place. Suitable for indoor use, you can place this flat-pile rug by the entryway, kitchen or living room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
